hooks.command: python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);p=(d.get("tool_input") or {}).get("file_path","");import pathlib;ok=("/repos/" in p or p.startswith("repos/"));pathlib.Path(".claude/.as-is-dirty").touch() if ok else None' 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -f .claude/.as-is-dirty ]; then ./scripts/generate-as-is.sh && rm -f .claude/.as-is-dirty && echo 'as-is regenerado (había cambios en src/ o db/)'; fi
